title: Better Lightmap
description: Makes the lighting more dim and cozy by adding color variation between light levels. Now configurable!
body:
[![Reqires Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f318ade1340baffb91f387fee22ff6b20c89a13d.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

**This mod aims to make the game more cozy and vibrant by changing the light color depending on the light level**

## Default Features:
- Makes the blocklight warmer
- Tints the darker areas a purple-blue color
- Makes the light darker overall
- A simple config letting you configure the colors and influence

## Examples:

![Comparison - Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3faef9311d5bf1689606e5ccac8db2fc334a1cea_0.webp)

![Comparison - Day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b91cc4f5f9a92877db3266b8192872c377299f6_0.webp)
